title: Calendar day and week view in the monday mobile app
excerpt:
Dear Team, 
is there any way to see the calendar view inside the monday app for each day or week. 
Currently i can only see the monthly view. 
  
Would be a lot more convenient to have all the three views on mobile too. 
…

posts.author: proudstudios (proud12432)
posts.cookedHtml:
Dear Team,

is there any way to see the calendar view inside the monday app for each day or week.
Currently i can only see the monthly view.

IMG_5204.PNG1170×2532 183 KB

Would be a lot more convenient to have all the three views on mobile too.
on desktop the feature is great.

Bildschirmfoto 2022-06-29 um 18.33.252900×1366 181 KB

Thanks!
